description: Ground-truth question bank for evaluating the plan document query engine. Each entry has a question, expected answer (reference), required_keywords (must appear in a good answer), and optional metadata.

questions.question: What is the project name shown on the title block?
questions.expected_answer: The project name should be extracted from the title block region of the plan.

questions.question: What is the sheet number?
questions.expected_answer: The sheet number should be found in the title block metadata.

questions.question: What date was this drawing last revised?
questions.expected_answer: The revision date should come from the revision table on the sheet.

questions.question: List all general notes on this sheet.
questions.expected_answer: All note items from the notes column should be enumerated.

questions.question: What abbreviations are defined on this plan?
questions.expected_answer: Abbreviation entries should be listed with their full-form expansions.

questions.question: What does the abbreviation 'GYP. BD.' stand for?
questions.expected_answer: Gypsum Board.

questions.question: Describe the legend symbols shown on the sheet.
questions.expected_answer: Legend entries with their descriptions should be listed.

questions.question: What fire rating requirements are mentioned in the notes?
questions.expected_answer: Fire rating references from general notes, e.g. 1-hour, 2-hour rated assemblies.

questions.question: Are there any accessibility requirements mentioned?
questions.expected_answer: ADA or accessibility references from notes.

questions.question: What structural materials are specified?
questions.expected_answer: Steel, concrete, wood, or other structural materials mentioned in notes or details.

questions.question: What concrete strength (PSI) is specified?
questions.expected_answer: Concrete compressive strength specification, e.g. 3000 PSI, 4000 PSI.

questions.question: What is the revision history of this sheet?
questions.expected_answer: Revision entries with dates and descriptions.

questions.question: Are there any references to IBC or building code sections?
questions.expected_answer: Building code references found in notes, e.g. IBC 2021 Section references.

questions.question: What standard details are referenced on this sheet?
questions.expected_answer: Detail callouts referenced in the plan.

questions.question: Summarize the key information on this sheet in 3-5 sentences.
questions.expected_answer: A concise summary covering the sheet type, key notes, and major content areas.

questions.question: What dimensions or measurements are noted on this sheet?
questions.expected_answer: Dimensions extracted from notes, details, or annotations.

questions.question: What roof specifications are mentioned?
questions.expected_answer: Roofing material specs, slopes, or assembly descriptions.

questions.question: What insulation requirements are specified in the notes?
questions.expected_answer: Insulation type, R-value, or thickness specifications.

questions.question: What waterproofing or moisture barriers are mentioned?
questions.expected_answer: Waterproofing or vapor barrier specifications from notes.

questions.question: What contractor responsibilities are outlined in the notes?
questions.expected_answer: Contractor responsibilities described in general or specific notes.

questions.question: Are there any seismic design requirements mentioned?
questions.expected_answer: Seismic design category, SDC, or earthquake-related requirements.

questions.question: What welding specifications or standards are referenced?
questions.expected_answer: Welding standards such as AWS D1.1 or similar references.

questions.question: What is the occupancy classification for this building?
questions.expected_answer: Occupancy group classification per IBC, e.g. B, A-2, S-1.

questions.question: What foundation details or specifications are shown?
questions.expected_answer: Foundation type, depth, reinforcement details.

questions.question: What MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) references are on this sheet?
questions.expected_answer: References to MEP drawings or coordination notes.

questions.question: What type of plan sheet is this (e.g., floor plan, elevation, detail)?
questions.expected_answer: The sheet type derived from the title block or sheet name.

questions.question: What scale is this drawing shown at?
questions.expected_answer: Drawing scale, e.g. 1/4" = 1'-0" or NTS.

questions.question: Who is the architect or engineer of record?
questions.expected_answer: The AOR or EOR name from the title block.

questions.question: Are there any notes about inspection or testing requirements?
questions.expected_answer: Special inspection or testing requirements from notes.

questions.question: What floor or level does this sheet correspond to?
questions.expected_answer: Floor/level identifier from the sheet metadata.

questions.question: What paint or finish specifications are mentioned?
questions.expected_answer: Paint types, finish specifications from notes.

questions.question: What door or window schedule information is shown?
questions.expected_answer: Door/window types, sizes, or schedule entries.

questions.question: Are there demolition notes in this plan?
questions.expected_answer: Demolition work scope described in notes.

questions.question: What are the setback or property line dimensions?
questions.expected_answer: Property line setbacks or boundary dimensions.

questions.question: What HVAC equipment or systems are referenced?
questions.expected_answer: HVAC units, ductwork, or system types referenced.

questions.question: What electrical panel or circuit information is shown?
questions.expected_answer: Electrical panel schedules or circuit specifications.

questions.question: What plumbing fixtures or specifications are noted?
questions.expected_answer: Plumbing fixture types or pipe specifications.

questions.question: What are the egress requirements for this area?
questions.expected_answer: Exit path, egress width, or occupant load requirements.

questions.question: Is there a note about the drawing being subject to final field verification?
questions.expected_answer: Field verification or 'verify in field' disclaimer note.

questions.question: What soil or geotechnical conditions are referenced?
questions.expected_answer: Soil bearing capacity, geotechnical report references.

questions.question: Are there any sustainability or LEED requirements mentioned?
questions.expected_answer: Green building, LEED, or sustainability references.

questions.question: What steel grades or specifications are called out?
questions.expected_answer: Steel grade designations like A992, A36, or ASTM references.

questions.question: What notes reference coordination with other trades?
questions.expected_answer: Coordination notes referencing other disciplines.

questions.question: Compare the notes on page 1 versus page 2.
questions.expected_answer: A comparison of note contents across two pages.

questions.question: What anchor bolt specifications are mentioned?
questions.expected_answer: Anchor bolt size, type, or embedment depth.

questions.question: What is the building height or number of stories?
questions.expected_answer: Building height or story count from title block or notes.

questions.question: What construction type is specified (e.g., Type I, Type V)?
questions.expected_answer: IBC construction type classification.

questions.question: What are the key room names or zones identified on this sheet?
questions.expected_answer: Room names or zone labels extracted from the plan.

questions.question: Are there any phasing or sequencing notes?
questions.expected_answer: Construction phasing or sequencing information.

questions.question: What quality control or quality assurance requirements are specified?
questions.expected_answer: QC/QA procedures or requirements from notes.
